name: A Game of Thrones: The Card Game (Second Edition)
description: A Game of Thrones: The Card Game is Fantasy Flight's flagship Living Card Game adaptation of George R. R. Martin's series — pick a great house (Stark, Lannister, Targaryen, Baratheon, Greyjoy, Martell, Tyrell, or the Night's Watch), build a deck of characters, locations, and intrigues, and win challenges of military, intrigue, and power across a sequence of plots. Long-running, deeply political, and famously cutthroat.
